##RRUFFID=R120069
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_4_[Mg_6_Al_6_]O_4_[Si_6_B_3_Al_3_O_36_]
##LOCALITY=Mogok, Burma
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Deep blue/purple fragment that almost appears black. Twinned by a 2-fold rotation around (010), according to single crystal X-ray diffraction.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120069
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.013 b: 10.4001 c: 8.6431 alpha: 106.415 beta: 96.024 gamma: 124.361 volume: 671.8 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
